text: I'd love to do a clickthrough of Dendryscope, which I'm sprucing up for a proper tool release. I last posted about it, uh, two years ago probably? It's meant for narrative designers to playtest their games with an intelligent interface, and happens to be a fun use case for answer set programming via clingo in the browser.
